gitCommit.subject: fix: add hlsDestroyedRef guard to prevent native onError from overwriting HLS error
gitCommit.body:
fix: add hlsDestroyedRef guard to prevent native onError from overwriting HLS error

BUG #3: After hls.js destroys itself on fatal error (hlsRef.current=null),
the native video element fires an onerror event with code 4 (MEDIA_ERR_SRC_NOT_SUPPORTED).
This overwrote the helpful HLS error message with the misleading
'O formato pode nao ser suportado' message shown in the screenshot.

Fix: hlsDestroyedRef tracks when HLS cleanup has run. The onError handler
checks this flag and returns early, preserving the HLS error message.
hlsDestroyedRef is reset on every initPlayer() call.
